meta.title: From JINX to VI
meta.message: Jinx and Vi are orphan sisters from Zaun, the underbelly of the rich Piltover, in the animated series _Arcane_. Set in the universe of the game _League of Legends_, _Arcane_ showcases a stunning animation style and deep, thoughtful worldbuilding as it explores themes of inequity and oppression within this steampunk world. This show is a favorite of my teenage daughter, who recently dressed up in a homemade Jinx costume for Halloween.
